fields.summary: Security Defect: Resolve Transitive Dependencies in HRPortal
fields.description:
h1. 🚨 SECURITY COMPLIANCE DEVIATION DETECTED

The automated CI/CD pipeline blocked deployment of *HRPortal* (APP-004) due to a security compliance threshold breach.

* *Assigned Risk Score:* 77.5/100 (Threshold: 50.0)
* *Pipeline Action:* DEPLOYMENT GATE BLOCKED

h3. 🔍 Detected Transitive Risk Paths:
1. *CVE-2024-1163* (CVSS: 6.8) -> Attack Vector: `APP-004 -> pyjwt -> react-dom -> mysql-connector-java -> netty-all`
2. *CVE-2023-1146* (CVSS: 2.8) -> Attack Vector: `APP-004 -> pyjwt -> react-dom -> mysql-connector-java -> netty-all -> assertj-core`
3. *CVE-2024-1174* (CVSS: 7.4) -> Attack Vector: `APP-004 -> psycopg2 -> logback-classic -> jetty-server -> disruptor`

h3. 🛠️ Auto-Assigned Mitigations:
* Run a dependency tree isolation sweep.
* Replace/upgrade affected transitive components to latest non-vulnerable versions.
* Run `python pipeline.py` locally to re-verify compliance status.
